title: BetterCombat x Call of Yucatán
description: BetterCombat x Call of Yucatán Compatibility Datapack
body:
**BetterCombat x Call of Yucatán** — is a datapack that offers compatibility between the missing [Call of Yucatán](https://modrinth.com/mod/call-of-yucutan) and [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat). 

## ⚙️ Compatibility

* [Call of Yucatán](https://modrinth.com/mod/call-of-yucutan)
* [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)
* [playerAnimator](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator)
* [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

## 💬 Community
Join our [community on the discord server](https://discord.gg/nSJBpkeVv6) to chat, ask questions, or share your creations!
